title: EGS-v1 proposal module — CMPINST endpoints, validation, graph queries; F-450 edges CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED
handoff_scope: Executable proposal package under proposals/egs-v1/ with synthetic fixtures and graph API
reason: DT-D046 delivered research schema + illustrative EDTS-COMP edges. Implementation requires a non-kernel proposal module with CMPINST-only endpoints, per-property evidence links, applicability/lifecycle, validation rules, and graph queries — without inventing F-450 torque/connector/fastener/removal values or mutating frozen kernel schemas.
decision: Authorize proposals/egs-v1/ as the authoritative EGS-v1 implementation home (schema + validate + RelationshipGraph).
Do NOT mutate frozen EDTS Kernel schemas including schemas/assembly-relationship.schema.json.
Relationship endpoints MUST be exact component-instance IDs (CMPINST-*). Reject AID-*, EDTS-COMP-*, ASSET-* as graph nodes.
Require typed relationship classes, property_evidence_links (incl. relationship_existence), applicability, and lifecycle_status.
Engineering properties (torque, fasteners, connectors, removal index) may populate only when matching evidence_status=BOUND; CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED forbids populated engineering_properties.
Admit F-450 FL door sample edges as CANDIDATE_UNVERIFIED with null engineering_properties; draft subcomponent CMPINST IDs are research placeholders except CMPINST-VEH000001-DOOR-FL.
Use synthetic CMPINST-SYN-* fixtures for unit tests — never invent verified F-450 specs for tests.
Implement graph queries: direct_neighbors, dependency_traversal, impacted_component_traversal, find_cycles, topological_order.
Supersede research/relationship_graph/edges/ REL-00000N (EDTS-COMP nodes + illustrative torque claims) for implementation linking; retain as ILLUSTRATIVE research history only.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
